The name of Juan Manuel Márquez's WBO champion holding younger brother is **Floyd Mayweather Jr.**

This is inferred from the context, where it is mentioned that Floyd Mayweather Jr. was a five-division world champion and that the fight between Mayweather and Márquez was billed as "Number One/Número Uno," indicating Mayweather's status as a champion in the welterweight division. The context also notes that Mayweather was a return to the ring after a two-year layoff, suggesting his prominence in the boxing world.
